items: Wake up at the Witch's Mansion and perform a short morning routine: check mail, tools, and the plan for the day
Plant a first crop plot near the mansion using appropriate seeds and soil
Water or tend crops using ordinary tools or magic if available in the save
Harvest mature crops and store them by type for later cooking or crafting
Discover or create a magical crop/vegetable through essence or progression systems
Cook a simple recipe from ingredients gathered that same day
Cook a more advanced recipe requiring multiple ingredients or processed components
Brew a potion at the cauldron and immediately use or store it
Craft fertilizer, fodder, or another farm support item and apply it to crops or animals
Use the crafting bench to make a new tool, quest item, or household object
Explore a new biome and collect at least three location-specific resources
Use the map or quest markers to reach a remote landmark or puzzle site
Swim across a shoreline, river, or lake to reach a resource patch or hidden item
Use swimming plus shoreline exploration to reach a hidden resource, chest, or puzzle area
Craft and enchant the broom if the save is at that quest stage
Use broom flight to reach an elevated cliff, hidden path, or remote collectible
Compare reaching the same destination on foot versus by broom
Perform a full day loop that includes farming, crafting, socializing, and returning home at night
Gather a mixed set of forageables around Barrow End and the nearby wilderness
Harvest lumber, herbs, and minerals in one efficient route
Mine a metal or stone node and return the materials to the mansion
Perform a full crafting chain: gather, process, craft, and then use the final item
Create a dye, clothing piece, or cosmetic item for Abrill
Change Abrill's outfit or visible gear to match a goal, event, or environment
Rearrange or decorate a room in the mansion with a more personalized layout
Cast a farming-assist or everyday spell during routine island work
Perform a ritual at an altar or magical station
Create an amulet or talisman and equip it
Gather ingredients for a broom-related, ritual-related, or protection-related quest and execute the required craft/ritual
Solve a memory/order puzzle and collect the reward
Solve a projectile puzzle such as ringing bells with thrown items
Solve a placement or stone puzzle and collect the resulting item or recipe
Complete a quest step that includes a dialogue choice with an NPC
Advance a character-specific quest chain with multiple prerequisites or stages
Track a multi-step quest from discovery to crafting to travel to turn-in
Open magical chests or special loot containers during exploration
Use the compendium to identify a needed ingredient and then route a collection plan around it
Give a liked gift to an NPC and increase the relationship level
Visit NPCs from multiple cultures in one route and compare the interactions
Sell gathered or crafted goods at a market or trader
Buy seeds, bait, or crafting ingredients from a vendor and use them the same day
Complete a noticeboard commission or small local errand if available
Care for a domesticated animal by feeding, checking supplies, or collecting outputs
Capture, tame, or domesticate a new animal if the save has access to the mechanic
Ride or rent a Tzoru mount for traversal and movement variety
Set up or progress an animal breeding loop if the current save has unlocked it
Possess the cat familiar and access a narrow exploration path or secret space
Use a fishing rod with bait and complete the reeling sequence successfully
Fish in a different water type or at a different time of day from a previous clip
